name: SONIC AUTOMOTIVE INC
summary: Sonic Automotive, Inc. is one of the largest U.S. automotive retailers, operating through three segments: Franchised Dealerships (111 stores, 134 franchises, 24 brands, 16 collision centers in 18 states), EchoPark (18 pre-owned vehicle specialty stores in 10 states), and Powersports (14 locations, 41 franchises). Services include new and used vehicle sales, Fixed Operations (parts, service, collision repair), and third-party F&I products including financing, extended warranties, and insurance.

products.name: New Vehicle Sales
products.description: Sale of new cars and light trucks across 24 brands including BMW, Mercedes, Honda, and Toyota.

products.name: Used Vehicle Sales
products.description: Sale of pre-owned vehicles through franchised dealerships and EchoPark specialty retail locations.

products.name: Fixed Operations
products.description: Vehicle maintenance, manufacturer warranty repairs, replacement parts sales, and paint and collision repair services.

products.name: Finance, Insurance and Other Aftermarket Products (F&I)
products.description: Third-party financing, leasing, extended warranties, service contracts, and insurance products arranged for guests.

products.name: EchoPark Pre-Owned Retail
products.description: Omnichannel pre-owned vehicle specialty retail concept operating 18 stores in 10 states with low-price inventory.

products.name: Powersports Sales
products.description: Sales of new and used motorcycles, personal watercraft, and all-terrain vehicles with Fixed Operations and F&I services.

products.name: Certified Pre-Owned (CPO) Vehicles
products.description: Manufacturer-certified pre-owned vehicles with extended warranties, sold exclusively through franchised dealerships.

partnerships.description: Single third-party provider used for the majority of extended warranties, service contracts, and other aftermarket products.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
